title: rubus × debrayi
intro: Rubus × debrayi, also known as the Debray's blackberry or hybrid blackberry, is a cross between Rubus ursinus and Rubus leucodermis, two species of blackberry plants. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, which can be attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits associated with Rubus × debrayi include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
